summary: British portraitist, grandson of Sigmund Freud. Known for Benefits Supervisor Sleeping (obese nude Sue Tilley), Girl with a White Dog, Girl with a Kitten. Painted 'ugly naked people' in grimy London flats.

works.name: Benefits Supervisor Sleeping
works.description: Obese nude Sue Tilley napping on a couch.

clues.clue: Obese nude woman (Sue Tilley / 'Big Sue') napping on a couch
examples: the naked, obese Sue Tilley resting on a broken-down couch

works.name: Girl with a White Dog (1951–52)
works.description: First wife Kitty Garman with one breast visible, yellow robe, bull-terrier on legs.

clues.clue: First wife with one breast visible from yellow robe; bull-terrier on her legs
examples: holding her hand over her left breast as her right breast pops out of a loose yellow bathrobe

works.name: Girl with a Kitten
works.description: Wife seemingly strangling a tabby cat.

clues.clue: Wife appears to strangle a tabby cat while staring into distance
examples: stares into the distance while seemingly strangling a tabby cat

clues.clue: British portraitist; grandson of Sigmund Freud
Married Kitty Garman and Lady Caroline Blackwood
examples: married Lady Caroline Blackwood and Kitty Garman

clues.clue: Painted nude Kate Moss; spent 4,000 hours painting his mother
examples: painted a nude portrait of Kate Moss in 2002

clues.clue: Interior at Paddington and Large Interior, W11: grimy London flats
examples: Large Interior, W11 and Interior at Paddington

comprehensive_summary: Lucian Freud was a British portraitist, grandson of Sigmund Freud. Benefits Supervisor Sleeping shows obese nude Sue Tilley on a couch. Girl with a White Dog depicts his first wife Kitty with one breast visible. Girl with a Kitten shows Kitty strangling a cat. He married Kitty Garman and Lady Caroline Blackwood, painted nude Kate Moss, and spent 4,000 hours painting his mother.
